title: Matrimonial Mahabharata: Supreme Court quashes 80 cases filed by lawyer-husband, orders ₹5 crore alimony for his wife
description: The Supreme Court recently ended a decade-long divorce case it termed a "matrimonial battle of Mahabharata". A Bench of Justices Vikram Nath and Sandeep Mehta ordered a lawyer to pay ₹5 crore in alimony after noting he weaponised his legal expertise to file over 80 proceedings against his wife, her family and her advocates.The Court dissolved the marriage on the ground of irretrievable breakdown and quashed all pending litigation to put a definitive end to the harassment."This is a supremel
